快3靠谱计划群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239218551_66255647<br>vk.com/topic-239183222_65205911<br>vk.com/topic-239241798_65104363<br>vk.com/topic-239199190_65656209<br>vk.com/topic-239218562_65205914<br>vk.com/topic-239183455_64507685<br>vk.com/topic-239149036_64915013<br>vk.com/topic-239226415_64507691<br>vk.com/topic-239218404_64590874<br>vk.com/topic-239183496_64915015<br>vk.com/topic-239142218_65104424<br>vk.com/topic-239182909_65383133<br>vk.com/topic-239199061_66255659<br>vk.com/topic-239199795_64507696<br>vk.com/topic-239218541_66255662<br>vk.com/topic-239149174_64590882<br>vk.com/topic-239149173_64762304<br>vk.com/topic-239149195_64507702<br>vk.com/topic-239183486_64915028<br>vk.com/topic-239212682_65205931<br>vk.com/topic-239183286_64915033<br>vk.com/topic-239142218_65104431<br>vk.com/topic-239183219_65383146<br>vk.com/topic-239149226_64915036<br>vk.com/topic-239218345_64507707<br>vk.com/topic-239183478_65104433<br>vk.com/topic-239218460_65656227<br>vk.com/topic-239218541_66255669<br>vk.com/topic-239183374_64590894<br>vk.com/topic-239226479_65383152<br>vk.com/topic-239153780_65656233<br>vk.com/topic-239183495_64507712<br>vk.com/topic-239183486_64915043<br>vk.com/topic
